docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-30-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF XINSEN LIANG APPEARED THROUGH CANTONESE INTERPRETER VIVIAN CHOY. DEFENDANT RAFAEL SERRANO DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ILLEGIBLE - UNABLE TO FORWARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SERRANO, RAFAEL
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-30-2017 AT 1:30PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2017 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY LIANG, XINSEN AS TO DEFENDANT SERRANO, RAFAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF POS BY MAIL ATTACHED. FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED JUL-29-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SERRANO, RAFAEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIANG, XINSEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERRANO, RAFAEL $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,155.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIANG, XINSEN AS TO DEFENDANT SERRANO, RAFAEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF XINSEN LAING IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY VIVIEN CHOY, CANTONESE INTERPRETER, WHO WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRTERS OATH. DEFENDANT RAFAEL SERRANO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
